title: Change CORS proxy provider to google.com

requirements.summary: Replace allorigins.win with google.com as the CORS proxy provider base URL in useTabs.ts, updating all proxy URL generation logic
acceptanceCriteria: useTabs.ts proxy URL generation uses google.com as the provider base URL
No references to allorigins.win remain in useTabs.ts

file_operations.description: Replace the proxy provider base URL from allorigins.win to google.com in all proxy URL generation logic. Update any string constants, template literals, or URL construction code that references allorigins.win to use google.com instead. Ensure the proxy URL format is adjusted if needed to match google.com's expected CORS proxy structure.

requirements.summary: Update all hardcoded proxy provider references in HomeSearch.tsx and TabContent.tsx to use google.com instead of allorigins.win
acceptanceCriteria: HomeSearch.tsx references google.com as the proxy provider
TabContent.tsx references google.com as the proxy provider
No references to allorigins.win remain in HomeSearch.tsx or TabContent.tsx

file_operations.description: Replace any hardcoded references to allorigins.win with google.com. Update proxy-related UI text, error messages, status displays, or URL construction logic to reflect the new proxy provider.
Replace any hardcoded references to allorigins.win with google.com. Update proxy-related UI text, error messages, retry logic, or URL display to reflect the new proxy provider.
